name: Interactive Map
blurb: Geographic assessments with labeled, clickable regions.
examplePrompt: An interactive map of South America where the student clicks the country that contains the Amazon rainforest. Highlight the correct answer in green.

name: Area Model
examplePrompt: An area model showing 23 × 14 split into partial products, with the student filling in each region.

name: Magic Square
blurb: Arithmetic puzzle assessments where rows, columns, and diagonals share a sum.
examplePrompt: A 3×3 magic square with a target sum of 15, three cells pre-filled, and the student completing the rest.

name: Geoboard
blurb: Geometric shape and area exploration on a peg grid.
examplePrompt: A geoboard where the student stretches a band to make a triangle with an area of 6 square units.

name: Learnosity Item
blurb: Assessment items compatible with the Learnosity platform.
examplePrompt: A multiple-choice Learnosity item asking which planet is closest to the sun, with four options and Mercury as the correct answer.

name: Flashcards
blurb: Vocabulary, matching, and memory game assessments.
examplePrompt: A set of flashcards matching five Spanish color words to their English meanings, playable as a memory game.

name: Spreadsheet
blurb: Structured, embeddable spreadsheets with live formulas.
examplePrompt: A monthly budget spreadsheet with labeled income and expense rows, a SUM total, and a remaining-balance cell that updates live.

name: Concept Web
examplePrompt: A concept web about photosynthesis: 'Light Reactions' at the center, connected to Calvin Cycle, Chlorophyll, and ATP Production. Dark theme.

name: Charts
blurb: Declarative charts compiled to Apache ECharts — bar, line, pie, donut, and more.
examplePrompt: A combo chart titled 'Quarterly Revenue & Growth' with eight quarters on the x-axis (Q1–Q4 2024, then Q1–Q4 2025). Revenue as vertical bars (thousands): 120, 150, 170, 210, 240, 230, 290, 340. A smooth line on a secondary y-axis shows quarter-over-quarter growth percent: 0, 25, 13, 24, 14, -4, 26, 17. Label the left axis 'Revenue ($K)' and the right axis 'Growth (%)'. Include a legend, value labels on the bars, light gridlines, and a clean modern theme.
